title: Tick Control East New York Brooklyn | $125-$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in East New York, Brooklyn. Protect your family & pets from tick-borne diseases. Starting at $125. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: East New York residents face increasing tick populations in yards, gardens, and green spaces throughout the neighborhood. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses with proven treatment methods. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive tick elimination for East New York homes and businesses at competitive rates.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving East New York families with safe, EPA-approved tick treatments that target all life stages. Our licensed technicians understand Brooklyn's unique pest challenges and provide customized solutions with guaranteed results and follow-up inspections to ensure your property remains tick-free throughout the season.
localContext: From the residential blocks near Highland Park to properties along Linden Boulevard and the multifamily homes throughout the neighborhood, East New York's mix of yards, community gardens, and proximity to green spaces creates ideal conditions for tick populations. We treat backyards, front gardens, playground areas, and perimeter zones around homes to create protective barriers against these dangerous pests.

faqs.question: What does tick control service include in East New York?
faqs.answer: Our tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted treatment of high-risk areas like tall grass, shrubs, and fence lines, perimeter barrier application, and follow-up visits as needed. We focus on yards, garden beds, and outdoor living spaces where ticks typically harbor and wait for hosts.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in East New York?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in East New York range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments, seasonal packages, and year-round protection plans. Contact us for a free quote customized to your specific property needs.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Brooklyn and when should I treat?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Brooklyn runs from April through October, with peak activity in May through July. We recommend starting treatments in early spring before ticks become active and continuing with monthly or bi-monthly applications throughout the season for maximum protection against deer ticks, dog ticks, and other species.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Treatments typically require a 2-4 hour drying period before children and pets can return to treated areas. We provide clear instructions and can schedule applications at convenient times to minimize disruption to your household.
